strengths: Demonstrated consistent grasp control throughout the attempt
Maintained steady camera positioning during transfers
Successfully completed multiple ring transfers before time limit
weaknesses: Failed to complete the task within the 300-second time limit
Inefficient movement patterns led to time management issues
Excessive regrasping and repositioning slowed overall progress

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on smooth hand-to-hand exchanges.
drills.targets_weakness: Inefficient movement patterns and excessive regrasping

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform the task phase slowly with minimal wasted regrasping, emphasizing direct paths between pegs.

drills.name: Timed completion drill
drills.description: Complete full 6-ring transfers in progressive time targets: 180s, 150s, then 120s.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid grasp mechanics into faster, more efficient transfer sequences. Your technique is sound but needs streamlining to consistently complete within time limits.
